rules.name: Feedback visibility
rules.description: Users should get visible status and feedback during interaction.

rules.name: Clear structure
rules.description: Views should expose clear heading, title, and main landmarks.

rules.name: Form clarity
rules.description: Interactive forms should provide labels or accessible naming.

rules.name: Consistency and standards
rules.description: Area base templates should provide consistent navigation and shell affordances.

rules.name: Error prevention and recovery
rules.description: Views should expose alerts, status regions, or visible recovery affordances.

rules.name: Accessibility support
rules.description: Views should expose accessibility signals such as labels, live regions, and landmarks.

rules.name: Contract alignment
rules.description: UI surfaces should have discoverable relevant contracts or guidance.

rules.name: Templatify alignment
rules.description: Area shell information should align with templatify base block mappings where available.
